languages.text: "Благодарю за своевременное вмешательство, Лорд-капитан. Приступаю к операции".
"Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю за своевременное вмешательство, Лорд-капитан. Приступаю к операции".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."
"Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."
"Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

languages.text: 「時機を逃さずの介入、ありがとうございます。艦長。手順を開始する」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

traits.locale_text: 「時機を逃さずの介入、ありがとうございます。艦長。手順を開始します。」

languages.text: "Zamanında müdahale ettiğiniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan. Prosedüre başlanıyor."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

traits.locale_text: "Zamanında müdahale ettiğiniz için teşekkürler Lord Kaptan. Prosedüre başlanıyor."

languages.text: «Gracias por su oportuna intervención, Lord Capitán. Comenzando el procedimiento».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por su oportuna intervención, Lord Capitán. Comenzando el procedimiento».

languages.text: “感谢您的及时干预，舰长大人。程序启动中。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的及时干预，舰长大人。程序启动中。”

languages.text: « Merci pour votre intervention opportune, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Démarrage de l'opération. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

traits.locale_text: « Merci pour votre intervention opportune, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Démarrage de l'opération. »

languages.text: "Danke für Euer rechtzeitiges Eingreifen, Lord Captain. Beginne mit der Prozedur."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for your timely intervention, Lord Captain. Commencing the procedure."

traits.locale_text: "Danke für Euer rechtzeitiges Eingreifen, Lord Captain. Beginne mit der Prozedur."
